prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9c1e755f`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_9c1e755f` end-to-end. The rule is: a gray `5` scaffold copies nearby structure, either stretching aligned singleton colors across a horizontal bar or cycling attached template rows down a vertical bar, with mixed cases combining a vertical template side and a singleton-side horizontal `5` bar.

I used the Opus hint only as rough direction and discarded the Sonnet example-by-example summary as faithful source material because it invents an extra no-bar case that is not in the official task file; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9c1e755f/notes.md). The generator stays close to the official family by sampling only the observed structures: horizontal fill, vertical template-copy, and mixed vertical-plus-horizontal-bar cases, then mirroring them for placement variety. No new primitive was added.

Verification/build results: official examples `5/5` passed, generated examples `1000/1000` passed, and the preview sheet looked on-family. Task package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9c1e755f/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9c1e755f/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9c1e755f/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9c1e755f/notes.md). Generated outputs are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9c1e755f/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9c1e755f/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9c1e755f/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9c1e755f/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9c1e755f/previews/preview_03.png).
